text:
“Disney Blockbuster Summer” Kicks off with New Bounties Inspired by The Mandalorian and Grogu

We’ve gathered some galactic goodies—toys, collectibles, plush, jewelry, and more—perfect for fans looking to celebrate their love of this iconic duo.

The post “Disney Blockbuster Summer” Kicks off with New Bounties Inspired by <em>The Mandalorian and Grogu</em> appeared first on D23.
